source_policy.license_note: External Archive images are referenced by URL only. Do not commit or redistribute source images without a separate license review.
source_policy.identity_note: Use as a loose visual reference for a fictional avatar, not as a direct likeness recreation.

visual_reference_notes.source: Derived from the provided external image URL for avatar art direction only.
high_level_appearance: weathered outdoor face with slight redness and under-eye tiredness
short salt-and-pepper stubble beard and mustache
clothing_reference: dark charcoal or black puffer-style hooded jacket zipped high at the neck
cold-weather outdoor clothing with no visible jewelry or accessories beyond hat and hood
avoid: Do not recreate the exact photo crop, pose, or identity.
Do not include watermarks or Archive UI.
Do not infer personal details not present in the source image.

avatar_generation_guidance.preferred_reference_mode: Use broad age, weathering, facial-hair, and clothing cues for a new fictional character.
metahuman_notes: Create a realistic adult male with a weathered face, tired eyes, and short salt-and-pepper stubble.
For clothed references, use a dark hooded cold-weather jacket and dark knit cap.
Keep the final generated avatar clearly production-created and fictional.
